data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-validate-shim-refs-integration.sh exists and is executable
- [ ] Test verifies that validate.sh source contains a shim-refs check call (static grep)
- [ ] Test fails (RED) because validate.sh does not yet contain the shim-refs integration
- [ ] .test-index updated with RED marker for this test file
- [ ] Test runs without errors when check-shim-refs.sh is absent (expected failure, not crash)
